chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-1380 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-7019/2020 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on MA-7020/2020. 4. For orders on MA-7021/2020 5. For hearing of main case. 10.12.2020 Mr. Kashif Hussain Agha, advocate for petitioner. = 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. The petitioner by way of instant petition has prayed that the report dated 28.10.2020 issued by Medical Board to be declared illegal and with this he has also sought for direction against the medical board to re-examine injured Muhammad Parhyal and then to issue a fresh report in respect of injuries sustained by him. On being asked, how the report issued by the Medical Board could be declared illegal by this Court? It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that it could be declared illegal as it has been issued by Medical Board without providing chance of hearing to the petitioner. Providing a chance of hearing to the petitioner before issuance of expert opinion by Medical Board with regard to the injuries sustained by the injured is not the requirement of law, which may justify declaring an expert opinion to be illegal by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmed/Pa,
